title: aragallus multiceps
intro: Aragallus multiceps is a type of plant also known as western bugloss, which belongs to the Boraginaceae family. Traditionally, the plant has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Aragallus multiceps include its ability to reduce fever, relieve respiratory issues, and support digestive health. Aragallus multiceps can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures for medicinal use.
